# Moammar Iqbal Portfolio

> Moammar Iqbal is a Software Developer and Fullstack Web Developer based in Cirebon, West Java, Indonesia.

## About

Moammar Iqbal is a Fullstack Web Developer focused on developing scalable web applications, fintech systems, API integrations, and data-driven internal tools using Laravel, React, and MySQL. He currently works as a Software Engineer at TransferKu, a digital remittance company, and previously interned at Diskominfo Kabupaten Cirebon as a Fullstack Web Developer & Data Intern.

His background in Computerized Accounting (STMIK IKMI Cirebon) helps him understand business needs, transaction recording, reporting, and data processing.

## Website

- Portfolio: https://moammariqbal-portofolio.vercel.app/
- GitHub: https://github.com/MoammarIqbal
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/moammar-iqbal-388969376

## Core Skills

- Laravel (PHP framework)
- React (JavaScript library)
- MySQL (relational database)
- REST API development and integration
- JavaScript / jQuery
- Tailwind CSS
- Python
- Data Mining & Machine Learning
- Data Visualization & Dashboard Development

## Featured Projects

### AML Monitoring System
A fullstack transaction monitoring system for Anti-Money Laundering, fraud prevention, and counter-terrorism financing at TransferKu. Built with Laravel, React, MySQL, and REST API.
- URL: https://aml-dash.transferku.id/

### TransferKu
A digital remittance system for international and domestic transfers supporting B2B, B2C, C2B, and C2C transactions. Built with Laravel, MySQL, and REST API.
- URL: https://dashboard.transferku.id/

### AI-Powered Accounting Journal
An AI-integrated accounting journal system that helps non-accountants record transactions using natural language, processing them into journals up to trial balance. Built with Laravel, MySQL, and AI (LLaMA 4).
- URL: https://ai-powered-accounting-journal.freedev.app/
- Source: https://github.com/MoammarIqbal/AI-Powered-Accounting-Journal

### TransferKu Documentation
A React-based documentation website for partners to integrate TransferKu's API.
- URL: https://docs.transferku.id/

### Letter Archive System
A web application for managing company letters with automated letter number generation at TransferKu. Built with Laravel and MySQL.

## Work Experience

### Software Engineer — TransferKu (November 2025 - Present)
Developing web-based internal systems, building and integrating APIs for real-time data synchronization, performing transaction validation and monitoring.

### Fullstack Web Developer & Data Intern — Diskominfo Kabupaten Cirebon (March 2025 - June 2025)
Developed a web-based village data recording and management system, processed data into reports and visualizations.

## Education

- STMIK IKMI Cirebon — Computerized Accounting (2023 - 2026)
